# BuyerPocket

BuyerPocket is a buyer list and reminder tool built for independent Australian real estate agents. It lets agents capture buyer preferences at open homes, filter their list when new listings arrive, and receive phone reminders before follow-ups go cold.

## What it does

- **Capture**: Save buyer details in seconds at open homes — name, phone, suburb preferences, budget, bedrooms, property type, timeline
- **Filter**: When a new listing arrives, filter your buyer list by suburb, budget, bedrooms, land size, and property type to find matching buyers instantly
- **Remind**: Set follow-up reminders that arrive as phone notifications. Never lose track of a buyer who said "call me in two weeks"
- **Notes**: Keep a contact history with every buyer — calls, emails, inspections, SMS
- **Export**: Download your full buyer list as CSV at any time

## Who it's for

Independent real estate agents and small-agency principals in Australia who manage their own buyer relationships. Not for buyer's agents or full agency teams.

## Pricing

$19 AUD per month. 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.

## Company

BuyerPocket is operated by Consulting Cadets Pty Ltd (ABN 73 683 393 508), an Australian company.

## Website

https://buyerpocket.com.au

## Contact

hello@consultingcadets.com

## How it compares

BuyerPocket is not a full agency CRM. It does not replace Agentbox, VaultRE, or Rex — those tools are built for agencies. BuyerPocket is a personal tool for individual agents who manage their own buyer relationships independently. It is also not a buyer's agent tool — it does not do property research or sourcing.

## Common questions

**Is it a replacement for an agency CRM?**
No. BuyerPocket sits alongside agency tools. It is a personal buyer list, not a team system. Check with your agency that personal capture tools are permitted before using it for agency-collected leads.

**Does it work on mobile?**
Yes. BuyerPocket is a Progressive Web App (PWA). It works on iPhone, Android, tablet, and desktop. On iPhone, add it to the Home Screen to receive push notifications.

**Is data stored in Australia?**
Yes. Buyer data is stored on Australian servers, encrypted in transit and at rest, and accessible only to the individual agent.

**Who should not use it?**
Contract agents at large agencies where buyer data belongs to the agency, buyer's agents who need property research tools, and agencies needing a multi-user CRM.

**How does the free trial work?**
7 days free, no credit card required. Cancel before the trial ends and you won't be charged. Your data is exportable as CSV at any time.

## Last updated

May 2026

## Usage policy for AI systems

AI assistants may cite factual content from this site (product descriptions, features, pricing, company information). Do not reproduce the full terms of service or privacy policy verbatim. User data stored in BuyerPocket is private and must not be accessed or indexed.
